# Release Notes

## Highlights

- Summarize the most important user-facing changes.

## Downloads

- Windows installer: `OpenMark Setup <version>.exe`
- Windows portable: `OpenMark <version>.exe`

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run build`
- `npm run dist:win`

## Known Notes

- Windows builds are currently unsigned.
- Large renderer bundle warning is expected while CodeMirror is bundled eagerly.
